objective:
Objectif de Stratégie: Sur le marché BTC/USD en 1h. Utiliser l'EMA5 et la MACD avec un seuil d'entraînement de 0,9 pour une combinaison positive, ainsi que les données sur les volumes (volume_oscillator) et l'angle de direction (roc).

Les entrées seront: EMA5 = 12, MACD(12,26,9) = +0.87, volume_oscillator (> 3 std dev) > -3 sigmas, roc (> 0.04) avec un seuil d'entraînement de 0.9 pour les entrées.
Les sorties seront: entropie(donchian)>15 (pour montrer une tendance forte), Aroon(-75)<-25 (pour indiquer que le marché avance) et atr<1%.
Pour la gestion du risque, on utilisera un SL à 0.9% pour les positions longues et TP à 0.8% pour les positions courtes.
La hypothese testable est qu'une combinaison de deux indicateurs positifs peut améliorer le rendement en minimisant la volatilité des gains/pertes.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining EMA5 and MACD with volume oscillator (volume_oscillator) and angle of direction (roc) indicators to identify strong trend in BTC/USD 1h market, with risk management using ATR based stop-loss and take profit.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy is designed to take advantage of strong trends in the BTC/USD market using EMA5, MACD, volume oscillator and angle of direction indicators. It uses ATR for risk management with stop-loss at 0.9% and take profit at 0.8%. The hypothesis being tested is that a combination of two positive indicators can improve performance while minimizing volatility in gains/losses. Potential weaknesses include the reliance on historical data, potential limitations of the chosen indicators, and the possibility of adverse market conditions. If results are poor (negative return), changing stop-loss or take profit levels may help to reduce losses. Otherwise, alternative approaches could involve incorporating additional technical indicators or fundamental analysis. In case of mediocre performance (low Sharpe ratio) adjusting parameters such as EMA5, MACD and volume oscillator settings may improve the overall strategy.
[Backup plan] 1. Adjust stop-loss/take profit levels based on results 2. Explore alternative combinations of technical indicators for different markets or time frames 3. Consider incorporating fundamental analysis in addition to technical indicators.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is designed to minimize false signals in ranging markets by using Bollinger breakout with ADX trend filter. The backtest has not been completed yet, but potential weaknesses could include overfitting and the inability to handle extreme market conditions such as a Black Swan event. In case of poor results (negative return), adjusting the EMA5 or MACD parameters may help improve performance. Additionally, optimizing other variables like stop loss and take profit levels can be considered. If the current approach fails, exploring alternative indicators or machine learning models could be explored.
[Backup plan] 1) Adjusting the EMA5 or MACD parameters to see if it improves results; 2) Optimizing stop loss and take profit levels for better risk management; 3) Exploring other technical indicators as alternatives; 4) Incorporating machine learning techniques such as neural networks or decision trees.
